urdu transliteration text:
Ay Maa Tum Mujhe Paas Bulalo Mujhe Pyaas Satati He
Turbat Se Ali Asghar Ki  Awaaz Ye Aati Hey
From The Grave Comes Ali Asghar's Voice
english translation text: O Mother Bring Me Close To You, The Thirst Is Making Me Suffer

urdu transliteration text:
Yaad Aaye Bohot Mujhko Tera Jhula Jhulana
Hyy, Kabhi Seene Se Laga Ke Tera Lori Sunana
Jab Rayt Garam Pyaari Maa - Mere Tan Ko Jalaati Hey
When The Hot Sand O' Mother Burns My Body
english translation text:
I Am Reminded Of You Rocking My Cradle
Oh, Sometimes Being Held Close To Your Chest Listening To You Sing A Lullaby

urdu transliteration text:
Haye Pyaas Ki Shiddat Se Gala Sukha Parha Hey
Hyy, Hey Zakhmi Gala Usme Ay Maa Dard Khara Hey
Turbat Me Akela Hu(n) Mey - Tanhaai Daraati Hey
english translation text:
My Throat Is Parched From The Intense Thirst
Oh, My Wounded Neck O' Mother Is Racked With Pain
I Am Alone In The Grave Terrified By The Loneliness

urdu transliteration text:
Jhule Mey Parha Asghar Din Raat Hey Roya
Asghar lay in the cradle crying day and night
Hyy, Jab Pyaas Bujhi Iski To Phir Cheyn Se Soya
Maqtal Mey Sakina Phir Kyun - Ise Dhoond Ne Jaati Hey
english translation text:
Oh, he slept soundly only when his thirst was quenched
Then why is Sakina searching  for him in the battlefield

Ik Khoon Bharey Chole Ko - Aankho Sey Lagaati Hey
english translation text:
A Lady Is Standing At The Tent's Entrance
Oh, She Is Desperately Gazing Towards The Battlefield
She Is Pressing A Blood Soaked Cloth Against Her Eyes

On Shame Ghariba A Terrible Oppression Occurred

Abbas Ka Saaniy-e-zahra - Hyy Farz Nibhaati Hey

english translation text: Oh, all the ladies were bare headed and the tents were burnt

Ik Baar Madine Aawo - Bemaar Bulaati Hey
english translation text:
These Winds Have Brought A Message, Akhtar
Oh, Asghar Sughra Is Remembering You
Come Back To Madina Your Ill(sister) Is Calling You
